commit.message:
Keep AOTCodeFlags in tier1

Signed-off-by: Ashutosh Mehra <asmehra@redhat.com>

Add AOTCodeTest.java that uses JavacBenchApp for testing. Update other
aotCode tests to use HelloWorld instead of JavacBenchApp.

Signed-off-by: Ashutosh Mehra <asmehra@redhat.com>

Use HelloWorld instead of JavacBench to run test

Signed-off-by: Ashutosh Mehra <asmehra@redhat.com>

Do not run AOTCodeFlags.java in tier1

Signed-off-by: Ashutosh Mehra <asmehra@redhat.com>

8381968: Extend cds/appcds/aotCode/AOTCodeFlags.java to run test with different flags in assembly and prod run

Signed-off-by: Ashutosh Mehra <asmehra@redhat.com>
